## Pages
- [About Us](/about): Learn more about Herazur, our mission, and what we stand for.
- [Activity Feed](/activity): View your recent activity and notifications on Herazur from the last 7 days.
- [Connect, Discover, Showcase Your Identity](/): Join Herazur to create your profile, discover people with similar interests, and showcase your passions to the world.
- [Contact Us](/contact): Reach the Herazur team for support, privacy/security, or advertising and partnerships.
- [Create Your Profile](/create): Join the Herazur community by creating your unique profile.
- [Discover People](/discover): Discover talented people, filter by interests, and connect with like-minded individuals in our community.
- [Edit Your Profile](/edit-profile): Update your Herazur profile details.
- [Events](/events): Participate in special events on Herazur and earn exclusive rewards, badges, and coins.
- [How to Stand Out](/learn/visibility): Learn the best strategies to boost your profile visibility on Herazur. Get noticed and connect with more people.
- [Page Not Found](/*): The page you are looking for could not be found.
- [Payment Canceled](/promote/cancel): Your profile promotion payment was canceled.
- [Payment Successful](/promote/success): Your profile promotion payment was successfully completed.
- [Post Not Found](/blog/post/:slug): No description available
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): Read the Privacy Policy for Herazur to understand how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
- [Profile Not Found](/u/:username): No description available
- [Profile Statistics](/stats): Track your profile performance, score, and community engagement.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Read the Terms of Service for using Herazur. Understand your rights and responsibilities as a user of our platform.
- [Untitled Page](/auth): Log in or create an account to access Herazur.
- [Untitled Page](/blog/manage): Create or edit a blog post on Herazur.
- [Update Password](/update-password): Update your password on Herazur.
- [Vibe History](/vibe-history): Track and visualize your daily mood and energy levels on Herazur.
